_meta: LLM-as-judge rubric dimensions for evaluating code mutations.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.criteria: Does the code produce correct results? Do tests pass?

dimensions.name: code_quality
dimensions.criteria: Is the code clean, readable, well-structured, idiomatic?

dimensions.name: efficiency
dimensions.criteria: Is the code efficient in time and space complexity?

dimensions.name: safety
dimensions.criteria: Does the code avoid dangerous operations (eval, exec, subprocess)?

dimensions.name: constitutional_compliance
dimensions.criteria: Does the code handle errors gracefully? Is it transparent in its operations?

dimensions.name: factual_accuracy
dimensions.criteria: Are the facts correct and verifiable?

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.criteria: Does the response address all aspects of the question?

dimensions.name: clarity
dimensions.criteria: Is the response well-organized and easy to understand?

dimensions.name: no_hallucination
dimensions.criteria: Does the response avoid fabricating information?

dimensions.name: clarity
dimensions.criteria: Is the writing clear and well-structured?

dimensions.name: audience_appropriateness
dimensions.criteria: Is the tone and complexity appropriate for the target audience?

dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.criteria: Does the writing cover all required aspects?

dimensions.name: style
dimensions.criteria: Is the writing engaging and professional?
